8-K
Apple Inc. 0000320193 0000320193-24-000123 2024-06-10

Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement

On June 10, 2024, Apple Inc. (the "Company") entered into a definitive agreement with the United States Department of Defense to supply custom semiconductor components for defense applications. The agreement has an estimated value of $500 million over three years, with deliveries expected to commence in Q1 2025.

Financial Statements and Exhibits
